entries.desc: HaGeZi Light - Blocks Ads, Tracking, Metrics and some Badware
HaGeZi Multi - Multi-protection list against Ads, Tracking, Telemetry, and Badware
HaGeZi Pro (Normal) - All-round protection against Ads, Tracking, Telemetry, Phishing, Malware
HaGeZi Pro Plus - Enhanced protection based on Pro with more aggressive rules
HaGeZi Ultimate (Aggressive) - Strictly cleans the Internet and protects your privacy
HaGeZi Pop-Up Ads - Protects against annoying and malicious pop-up ads!
HaGeZi DoH/VPN/TOR/Proxy Bypass - Prevent methods to bypass your DNS!
HaGeZi Safesearch - Prevent the use of search engines that do not support Safesearch!
HaGeZi Social Networks - Blocks access to social networks!
HaGeZi Anti Piracy - Protects against piracy!
HaGeZi NSFW - Protects against adult content!
HaGeZi Gambling - Protects against gambling content!
HaGeZi Spam TLDs - Blocks known spam top-level domains
AdGuard Cookie Notices - Network-level blocking for cookie consent popups and tracking scripts.
